addrmap ambaAPB {
   regfile {
      reg {
         field {
            desc = "Delay value for reset 0, 0=no delay, 1=delay by 1 ipclk, 2=delay by 2 ipclk, ...";
            sw = r;
            hw = na;
            reset = 8'h0;
         } delay[7:0];
         field {
            desc = "Reserved";
            sw = r;
            hw = na;
            reset = 24'h0;
         } Reserved[31:8];
      } reset0Delay @0x0;
      reg {
         field {
            desc = "Delay value for reset 1, 0=no delay, 1=delay by 1 ipclk, 2=delay by 2 ipclk, ...";
            sw = r;
            hw = na;
            reset = 8'h1;
         } delay[7:0];
         field {
            desc = "Reserved";
            sw = r;
            hw = na;
            reset = 24'h0;
         } Reserved[31:8];
      } reset1Delay @0x4;
      reg {
         field {
            desc = "Delay value for reset 2, 0=no delay, 1=delay by 1 ipclk, 2=delay by 2 ipclk, ...";
            sw = r;
            hw = na;
            reset = 8'h2;
         } delay[7:0];
         field {
            desc = "Reserved";
            sw = r;
            hw = na;
            reset = 24'h0;
         } Reserved[31:8];
      } reset2Delay @0x8;
      reg {
         field {
            desc = "Delay value for reset 3, 0=no delay, 1=delay by 1 ipclk, 2=delay by 2 ipclk, ...";
            sw = r;
            hw = na;
            reset = 8'h4;
         } delay[7:0];
         field {
            desc = "Reserved";
            sw = r;
            hw = na;
            reset = 24'h0;
         } Reserved[31:8];
      } reset3Delay @0xc;
      reg {
         field {
            desc = "Delay value for reset 4, 0=no delay, 1=delay by 1 ipclk, 2=delay by 2 ipclk, ...";
            sw = r;
            hw = na;
            reset = 8'h8;
         } delay[7:0];
         field {
            desc = "Reserved";
            sw = r;
            hw = na;
            reset = 24'h0;
         } Reserved[31:8];
      } reset4Delay @0x10;
      reg {
         field {
            desc = "Delay value for reset 5, 0=no delay, 1=delay by 1 ipclk, 2=delay by 2 ipclk, ...";
            sw = r;
            hw = na;
            reset = 8'h10;
         } delay[7:0];
         field {
            desc = "Reserved";
            sw = r;
            hw = na;
            reset = 24'h0;
         } Reserved[31:8];
      } reset5Delay @0x14;
      reg {
         field {
            desc = "Delay value for reset 6, 0=no delay, 1=delay by 1 ipclk, 2=delay by 2 ipclk, ...";
            sw = r;
            hw = na;
            reset = 8'h20;
         } delay[7:0];
         field {
            desc = "Reserved";
            sw = r;
            hw = na;
            reset = 24'h0;
         } Reserved[31:8];
      } reset6Delay @0x18;
      reg {
         field {
            desc = "Delay value for reset 7, 0=no delay, 1=delay by 1 ipclk, 2=delay by 2 ipclk, ...";
            sw = r;
            hw = na;
            reset = 8'h40;
         } delay[7:0];
         field {
            desc = "Reserved";
            sw = r;
            hw = na;
            reset = 24'h0;
         } Reserved[31:8];
      } reset7Delay @0x1c;
   } resetDelays @0x0;
   regfile {
      reg {
         field {
            desc = "Scratch memory, EEPROM";
            sw = rw;
            hw = r;
            reset = 32'h0;
         } data[31:0];
      } eeprom[8] @0x0;
   } EEPROM @0x20;
   // external reg {
   // } Reserved[1007] @0x40;
   regfile {
      reg {
         desc = "ID register";
         field {
            desc = "ID Field";
            sw = r;
            hw = na;
            reset = 32'hd01;
         } ID[31:0];
      } IDReg @0x0;
   } idAddressBlock @0xffc;
};
